title: wenzelia dolichophylla
intro: Wenzelia dolichophylla, also known as the 'Dolichophylla Wenzelia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is native to certain regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Wenzelia dolichophylla are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Wenzelia dolichophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or oils, which are often used to treat various ailments.
